Case Studies

Work that moved
the needle


Seoul · 2024–2026

Lash Studio — Built from Zero

Launched and marketed a solo lash extension business in Seoul with zero existing audience. Built the entire brand, created all content, ran Meta ads, and attracted a steady stream of international clients — fully self-managed from day one.

Meta Ads Organic Reels International clientele Solo-built brand
Phuket · 2024–2025

Phuket Pub Crawl — Nightlife & Beach Club Tours

Designed and ran premium guided experiences across Phuket — from daytime beach club tours to curated nightlife crawls. Personally negotiated barter deals with venues across the island: free welcome drinks, table reservations, food discounts, and free entry in exchange for bringing consistent groups. Led and managed guests throughout every experience. Earned consistent 5-star reviews on GetYourGuide from international travelers.

5★ GetYourGuide Beach clubs + nightlife Social promotion International travelers
Marketing Agency · 2020–2023

B2C Marketing Agency — Top Performer

Joined a B2C marketing agency and closed 60–80 contracts in my first month — running product photo and video shoots in-studio, sourcing target audience groups across platforms, and publishing content that converted. Combined sales, content creation, and distribution in one role.

Most contracts · Month 1 Campaign creation Client acquisition B2C Strategy
Seoul & Phuket · 2019–2025

Hospitality & Bar Management

7+ years in hospitality across Seoul and Phuket — bartender, bar manager, VIP hostess. Includes a standout pop-up event for a struggling bar: created a Russian food and cocktail menu, marketed it to a targeted audience, and generated 1.1–1.2M KRW in a single night vs the usual 200K KRW baseline. A 5–6x revenue result driven entirely by concept and promotion.

5–6x revenue in one night Pop-up event concept Menu creation 7+ years hospitality

About

Creative, bilingual,
and built for remote.


I've spent the last few years living between Seoul and Phuket, building brands, running ads, creating content, and getting results — mostly for myself, which is the hardest client there is.

My background is unusual: hospitality taught me how people work, marketing taught me how to reach them, and running my own businesses taught me how to do both with no safety net. I bring all of that to every project.

Before marketing, I spent 7 years in hospitality — bartending and bar management across multiple countries. That's where I learned how to read people fast, stay sharp under pressure, and make anyone feel welcome. It's also why I understand service brands better than most marketers who've only ever worked at a desk.

Currently completing the Meta Social Media Marketing Certificate. Fluent in English and Russian — useful in Southeast Asia more than most people expect.

Meta Ads Manager CapCut Canva Figma Instagram TikTok Short-form video Content strategy English / Russian Client acquisition Bar management Hospitality (7 yrs) UGC creation

How I can help
your brand grow


🎬

Short-Form Content

Reels, TikToks, and Stories that stop the scroll. Filmed, edited, captioned, and posted — or handed off ready to go.

🎯

Meta Ads Management

Campaign setup, audience targeting, creative testing, and optimization. Real ad experience — not just theory.

Social Media Management

Full account management: strategy, content calendar, posting, community engagement. You focus on your business.

Bilingual Marketing (EN/RU)

Reach Russian-speaking audiences in Southeast Asia, Europe, or anywhere in the world. A niche most marketers can't cover.

Content that converts,
